response.text:

rationale: Your SoC is 0.10 below threshold but my belief indicates acute neighborhood crisis with multiple peers at blackout-imminent levels; I must preserve my state to maintain critical household function and cannot commit outbound transfers until the 9-hour outage window resolves.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.75, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Neighborhood in acute energy crisis with 9 hours outage remaining; multiple peers at blackout-imminent SoC; I must observe my own state before committing to any outbound transfers..
